fault_hypothesis: The overlap check on line 62 uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`) which incorrectly classifies touching intervals as non-overlapping. It should use strict inequalities (`<`, `>`) to correctly detect conflicts when intervals touch at a boundary.

constraints.intent: The non-overlap condition should treat touching intervals as overlaps, which means using strict inequalities.
Each existing slot must be strictly separate from the candidate for the loop to continue.

spec.expr: all(candidate[1] < s[0] or candidate[0] > s[1] for s in existing)

constraints.intent: Merging should only occur if the candidate is strictly non-overlapping with all existing slots.

spec.expr: not __cbfl_result[0] or all(candidate[1] < s[0] or candidate[0] > s[1] for s in existing)

constraints.intent: An accepted candidate must be strictly non-overlapping with all original slots.
